creator: george+freebsd@m5p.com
text:
On 09/17/11 18:41, Pawel Pekala wrote:
> Dnia 2011-09-17, o godz. 18:14:59
> George Mitchell<george+freebsd@m5p.com>  napisa³(a):
>
>> As faw as I can tell, you are running with Java 1.6.  The point of my
>> bug fix was to run with Java 1.7 installed.  So I don't see any
>> connection between this bug, which looks to me like problems with
>> permissions after the package is installed, with my problem, which
>> was a failure to even install the package.
>
> Please test with openjdk7 after you upgrade to newest version of
> comms/rxtx committed in ports/159735. The problem should be fixed as the
> configure script of said port was improved and now it can detect all
> java paths correctly and install to right directories.
>
> I tested it with: diablo-1.6, openjdk6, openjdk7.
>

You are correct; after a csup ports-supfile I am now able to install
with openjdk7.  Thanks!  Please feel free to close my bug.  -- George
